notes: SHIP v1.14.236 ŌĆö FORGE DEFECT-1: RETIRE THE OLD RACK-DETAIL 3D VIEW. Owner-confirmed. The .218 opt-in FLAT|3D toggle on the Work-tab rack-detail elevation (wireframe rack + MINI strip) is superseded by FORGE 3D: two 3D doors onto the same rack violates the 'one door per feature' hard rule, and the old view competes for the single WebGL context the app allows. NAMING CORRECTION (the session brief got this wrong and it matters): `forge3d_*` is NOT the old view ŌĆö `forge3d_*` is the WRAPPER that HOSTS the new v2.9.2 aisle. Retiring it would have deleted Forge itself. The actual retire target is the `reh3d_*` family (`_reh3dActive`, `REH3D_PREF_KEY`, CSS `.reh-3d-*` / `.is-3d`). RE-HOME LAW HONORED ŌĆö unwired, NOT deleted (physical removal waits for the R1 deletion pass): (1) `rackElevation`'s rd branch no longer emits the `.reh-3d-toggle` FLAT|3D button group or the `#reh3dMount` 3D mount ŌĆö it now emits `#reh3dCanvasHost > #rehFlatWrap` only; (2) the `reh3d_restore(rack)` call in the double-rAF init is unwired, so a STALE `sessionStorage` `phantom_rackview_3d='1'` from a pre-.236 session cannot resurrect the retired view into a mount that no longer exists. FLAT remains the rack-detail default and is UNCHANGED ŌĆö `#rehFlatWrap` is `display:contents`, so the fitted 48U elevation (.228-.231 flat-fit saga) renders exactly as before; `rackFlat_applyFit` still targets `#rehFlatWrap .rack-canvas` untouched. All `reh3d_*` functions and `.reh-3d-*` / `.is-3d` CSS stay RESIDENT but unreachable (no callers) ŌĆö clean revert, R1 removes them. `forge3d_open()`'s cross-dispose guard against `_reh3dActive` is left in place and still correct (`_reh3dActive` simply stays null now). Legacy `else` branch emits the original line verbatim ŌĆö `?legacy=1` byte-identical (the toggle was always rd-only). Gates: node --check x4 inline blocks + sw.js, CSS braces balanced (12 style blocks, net delta 0), CRLF preserved, three-stamp .235->.236. DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD STOP, John iPhone; batch with .235): (1) Work tab -> rack detail -> the FLAT|3D toggle is GONE; the elevation renders FLAT exactly as it did in .231 (fitted 48U, no scroll, 1U rows readable); (2) the MINI/scrubber strip still works; (3) no console errors on rack-detail open; (4) FORGE 3D is now the only 3D door; (5) ?legacy=1 rack detail unchanged. Paired with .235 (Forge Master bridge + zero-state) ŌĆö one consolidated device pass. NEXT: .237 = D2 reconciliation per owner's ruling (field beats import; ADDED/MOVED/REMOVED diff on Master load; RECONCILE list with CONFIRM REMOVED vs FLAG MASTER ERROR; key on device identity, killing the nameless-device key collision). Deliberately NOT stacked on this unverified base. See INTEGRATION-STATE.md at repo root.
